message:
Running command: # Kill the pipe drain process - no longer needed
kill 257778 257780 2>/dev/null && echo "drain killed" || echo "drain already gone"

# Kill lingering monitoring bash sessions
for pid in 244710; do kill $pid 2>/dev/null; done

echo ""
echo "=== Restarting LibreLane — this time with nohup (session-safe) ==="
echo "Synthesis netlist will be reused (--overwrite restarts, but synthesis completes ~25min)"
echo ""

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

# Run in background with nohup so session timeouts don't kill it
# Direct output to file — no tee pipe that can deadlock
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --overwrite \
  --design-dir . \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log 2>&1 &

LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane started with PID $LR_PID"
echo "Log file: /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
echo "Start time: $(date)"

# Wait a moment and confirm it started
sleep 5
ps -p $LR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "CONFIRMED RUNNING" || echo "FAILED TO START"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
